name: gh-vibe-monorepo
description: Monorepo for gh-vibe — a gh CLI extension that bridges GitHub PRs/issues and vibe worktrees

scripts.ci: pnpm run check && pnpm run test
scripts.check:docs: pnpm -C packages/docs check && pnpm -C packages/docs build
scripts.check:all: pnpm run ci && pnpm run check:docs
